sections.paragraph:
Original: קנין

Transliteration: qinyân

Phonetic: kin-yawn'

BDB Definition:

  1. thing acquired, acquisition, possession, purchased property, wealth
    1. thing acquired (by purchase)
    2. creatures (more general)

Origin: from H7069

TWOT entry: 2039a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
